---
title: "BSS-GH-pooled-CPUE-model"
author: "Matt George"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
###############################################################################
# Crab Creel Estimation - Westport / Grays Harbor
# 2024-25 Season | Pooled CPUE Model
# Version: v6.2 (2026-06-17) - boat all-gear sampler tuning, on top of the
#          v6.1 divergence-aware convergence gate. See documentation Section 14.
#
# Three population components estimated independently:
#   1. Shore crabbers (dock + jetty + beach) — BSS + PE
#   2. Private boat crabbers — BSS + PE
#   3. Commercial/charter boats — Census/tally
#
# Two gear-regime sub-seasons:
#   Sub-season 1: Ring-net only (Sep 16 – Nov 30, no pots)
#   Sub-season 2: All-gear (Dec 1 – Sep 15, pots allowed)
#
# Port total = sum of all components
#
# KEY FEATURES:
#   - ADAPTIVE AR(1): Temporal resolution (daily/weekly/monthly) selected
#     automatically based on effort data density for each fit.
#   - CPUE DAY-TYPE EFFECT: B1_C allows weekend CPUE to differ from weekday.
#   - L_EFFECTIVE UNCERTAINTY: Day length estimated as a parameter with
#     lognormal prior from I/E regression, propagating uncertainty into catch.
#   - DATA-DRIVEN R_G PRIOR: Prior center computed from interview data.
#   - INFORMATIVE R_T PRIOR: Beta(5,1) for trailer-per-group ratio.
#   - NO INTERVIEW CAP: All interviews used.
#   - EXPECTED + PREDICTIVE CATCH: GQ reports both E[C|data] and Poisson draws.
#   - TIGHTER VARIANCE PRIORS: Half-Cauchy scales set to 1.
#   - SPARSE OVERDISPERSION: eps_E_H allocated per observation, not per day.
#   - I/E INTEGRATION: Direct crabber-hours as lognormal anchor points.
#   - DIVERGENCE-AWARE GATE (v6.1): A BSS fit with more than max_divergences
#     divergent transitions falls back to PE, matching the gear-resolved
#     track. Per-fit max_treedepth/adapt_delta overrides reduce divergences
#     and treedepth truncation on the dense shore all-gear geometry.
#   - BOAT ALL-GEAR TUNING (v6.2): Dedicated adapt_delta=0.99 / max_treedepth=13
#     settings for the divergence-heavy boat all-gear fit, attempted before
#     accepting the PE fallback.
###############################################################################

# ===========================================================================
# 0. SETUP
# ===========================================================================

load.lib <- c("tidyverse","lubridate","suncalc","gt","patchwork","rstan","here","readxl")
install.lib <- load.lib[!load.lib %in% installed.packages()]
for(lib in install.lib) install.packages(lib, dependencies=TRUE)
sapply(load.lib, require, character=TRUE)
rstan_options(auto_write = TRUE)
purrr::walk(list.files(here("R_functions"), full.names = TRUE), source)

run_date <- format(Sys.Date(), "%Y%m%d")
output_dir <- here("output", run_date, "pooled-CPUE")
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)

timer_log <- list()
timer_start <- function(label) { timer_log[[label]] <<- list(start = Sys.time()); invisible() }
timer_stop <- function(label) {
  timer_log[[label]]$end <<- Sys.time()
  elapsed <- difftime(timer_log[[label]]$end, timer_log[[label]]$start, units = "mins")
  timer_log[[label]]$elapsed <<- elapsed
  cat(sprintf("  [TIMER] %s: %.1f min\n", label, as.numeric(elapsed)))
  invisible()
}
run_start_time <- Sys.time()

# ===========================================================================
# 0.1 PARAMETERS
# ===========================================================================

params <- list(
  project_name      = "Coastal Recreational Crab",
  fishery_name      = "Rec Crab Grays Harbor 2024-25",
  est_date_start    = "2024-09-16",
  est_date_end      = "2025-09-15",
  season_filter     = "2024-25",
  pot_open_date     = "2024-12-01",
  commercial_opener = "2025-01-1",
  census_start_date = "2024-12-01",
  census_end_date   = "2025-02-08",
  estimate_red_rock = FALSE,
  days_wkend        = c("Friday", "Saturday", "Sunday"),
  min_fishing_time  = 0.5,
  period_pe         = "week",
  sections          = c(1),

  # --- BSS model settings ---
  bss_model_file    = "crab_bss_pooled.stan",
  bss_chains        = 4,
  bss_adapt_delta   = 0.9,
  bss_cores         = 4,
  bss_max_count_seq  = 3,

  # --- BSS convergence tuning ---
  # Extra iterations for longer sub-seasons and daily AR fits.
  bss_iter_default          = 3000,
  bss_warmup_default        = 1500,
  bss_max_treedepth_default = 10,
  bss_iter_shore_allgear    = 5000,
  bss_warmup_shore_allgear  = 2500,

  # Per-fit treedepth / adapt_delta overrides (v6.1, ported from gear-resolved
  # v5.2). The shore all-gear daily-AR posterior is the densest geometry and
  # saturated max_treedepth=10 on 91.6% of iterations in the 2026-04-08 run;
  # ring-net fits are data-sparse and benefit from tighter adaptation. Deeper
  # trees plus higher adapt_delta reduce divergent transitions and treedepth
  # truncation. Any fit without an override uses the *_default values.
  bss_treedepth_shore_allgear = 14,
  bss_delta_shore_allgear     = 0.95,
  bss_treedepth_ringnet       = 12,
  bss_delta_ringnet           = 0.95,

  # v6.2: boat all-gear sampler tuning. The boat all-gear fit failed in the
  # 2026-04-08 run (5998 divergences, R-hat 1.074, n_eff 76) under defaults
  # (adapt_delta 0.9, max_treedepth 10). treedepth_pct was 0, so divergences
  # came from step size, not trajectory truncation: adapt_delta is raised to
  # 0.99 (primary lever) and max_treedepth to 13 (buffer), with more iterations
  # to give n_eff a chance to clear 400. This is an attempt; if the fit still
  # fails the gate, the boat estimate falls back to PE as before.
  bss_iter_boat_allgear       = 5000,
  bss_warmup_boat_allgear     = 2500,
  bss_treedepth_boat_allgear  = 13,
  bss_delta_boat_allgear      = 0.99,

  bss_min_interviews = 20,

  # --- Convergence divergence criterion (v6.1, ported from gear-resolved v5.2) ---
  # Maximum divergent transitions allowed for a BSS fit to pass. Divergences
  # bias the posterior even when R-hat and ESS look clean (Betancourt 2017),
  # so they are now part of the pass/fail gate rather than recorded-but-ignored.
  #   0 = strict (any divergence fails); 5 = permissive.
  # Matches the gear-resolved default so both model tracks apply one standard.
  max_divergences = 5,

  # --- Adaptive AR temporal resolution ---
  # The model selects the finest AR resolution the data can support:
  #   daily:   effort obs on >= 25% of days AND >= 20 unique effort days
  #   weekly:  >= 1.5 effort obs per week on average
  #   monthly: fallback for sparse data
  # These thresholds can be overridden per-population if needed.
  ar_daily_min_coverage  = 0.25,  # fraction of days with effort obs
  ar_daily_min_obs       = 20,    # absolute minimum for daily
  ar_weekly_min_per_week = 1.5,   # average obs per week for weekly

  # --- I/E integration ---
  ie_data_file      = "ingress_egress.xlsx",
  ie_sheet          = "data",
  ie_shore_location = "WDF20",
  ie_boat_location  = "WBL",
  ie_use_all_dates_for_diagnostics = TRUE,

  # --- Gear-hours for boats ---
  boat_use_gear_hours = TRUE,

  # --- I/E-derived day length (regression with uncertainty) ---
  use_ie_day_length = TRUE,

  # --- Minimum I/E observations for regression (else use grand mean) ---
  ie_min_obs_for_regression = 5
)

# Crabbing holidays for 2024-25 season (high-effort days)
crabbing_holiday_dates <- as.Date(c(
  "2024-11-29",  # Native American Heritage Day
  "2024-12-31",  # New Year's Eve
  "2025-01-01",  # New Year's Day
  "2025-02-08",  # Super Bowl Eve
  "2025-05-24",  # Memorial Day weekend - Saturday
  "2025-05-25",  # Memorial Day weekend - Sunday
  "2025-05-26",  # Memorial Day
  "2025-06-15",  # Father's Day
  "2025-07-04",  # Independence Day (Friday = weekend, counts as holiday)
  "2025-09-01"   # Labor Day
))


catch_groups <- if(params$estimate_red_rock) {
  c("Dungeness_Kept", "Red_Rock_Kept")
} else {
  "Dungeness_Kept"
}

subseason_1 <- list(
  name = "ring_net_only",
  start = as.Date(params$est_date_start),
  end   = as.Date(params$pot_open_date) - 1
)
subseason_2 <- list(
  name = "all_gear",
  start = as.Date(params$pot_open_date),
  end   = as.Date(params$est_date_end)
)

cat(sprintf("Sub-season 1 (ring-net): %s to %s (%d days)\n",
            subseason_1$start, subseason_1$end,
            as.integer(subseason_1$end - subseason_1$start + 1)))
cat(sprintf("Sub-season 2 (all-gear): %s to %s (%d days)\n",
            subseason_2$start, subseason_2$end,
            as.integer(subseason_2$end - subseason_2$start + 1)))
cat(sprintf("Catch groups: %s\n", paste(catch_groups, collapse = ", ")))


# ===========================================================================
# 0.2 STANDALONE DAY-TYPE CLASSIFIER
#
# Assigns day_type to ANY date, independent of the estimation calendar.
# Use this for diagnostic plots that may show data outside the estimation
# period (e.g., effort data collected year-round but est_date_end is Jan 31).
# ===========================================================================

classify_day_type <- function(dates, weekends = params$days_wkend,
                              holidays = crabbing_holiday_dates) {
  case_when(
    dates %in% holidays ~ "holiday",
    weekdays(dates) %in% weekends ~ "weekend",
    TRUE ~ "weekday"
  )
}


# ===========================================================================
# 1. DATA INGESTION
# ===========================================================================

fetch_crab_data <- function(params) {
  cat("Reading data...\n")

  effort_raw <- read_csv(here("input_files","effort_combined.csv"), show_col_types=FALSE) |>
    filter(season == params$season_filter) |> mutate(date = as.Date(date))

  interview_raw <- read_csv(here("input_files","interview_combined.csv"), show_col_types=FALSE,
    col_types = cols(date=col_date(format="%m/%d/%Y"), crabbers=col_double(),
      number_of_gear=col_double(), dungeness_kept=col_double(), red_rock_kept=col_double(),
      hours_fished=col_double(), crabber_hours=col_double(), gear_hours=col_double(),
      completed_trip=col_character(), total_vehicles=col_double(), crabbing_holiday=col_integer())) |>
    filter(season == params$season_filter)

  gh_effort <- effort_raw |> filter(creel_area %in% c(
    "Westport Docks Float 20","Westport Docks Float 17-21",
    "Westport Boat Launch","Westport Marina","Westport Jetty",
    "Ocean Shores Boat Launch","Damon Point"))

  gh_interview <- interview_raw |> filter(creel_location == "Grays Harbor")

  gh_interview <- gh_interview |>
    mutate(
      event_date = as.Date(as.character(date), format = "%Y-%m-%d"),
      boat_type_clean = case_when(
        str_detect(boat_type, "(?i)commer") ~ "Commercial",
        str_detect(boat_type, "(?i)charter") ~ "Charter",
        str_detect(boat_type, "(?i)guide") ~ "Charter",
        str_detect(boat_type, "(?i)private") ~ "Private",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      population = case_when(
        boat_type_clean %in% c("Commercial","Charter") ~ "comm_charter",
        crabbing_mode == "Boat" & (is.na(boat_type_clean) | boat_type_clean == "Private") ~ "private_boat",
        crabbing_mode %in% c("Dock","Jetty","Beach") ~ "shore",
        TRUE ~ "shore"
      )
    )

  cat("  Grays Harbor interviews by population:\n")
  gh_interview |> count(population) |> mutate(l=sprintf("    %s: %d",population,n)) |>
    pull(l) |> walk(cat,"\n")

  gh_interview <- gh_interview |>
    filter(!is.na(crabbers), as.numeric(crabbers) > 0) |>
    mutate(
      interview_id = paste0(survey_id,"_",interview_num),
      section_num = 1,
      angler_count = as.integer(crabbers),
      number_of_gear = as.numeric(number_of_gear),
      hours_fished = as.numeric(hours_fished),
      crabber_hours_calc = as.numeric(crabber_hours),
      fishing_time_total = case_when(
        !is.na(crabber_hours_calc) & crabber_hours_calc > 0 ~ crabber_hours_calc,
        !is.na(hours_fished) & !is.na(angler_count) ~ hours_fished * angler_count,
        TRUE ~ NA_real_
      ),
      gear_time_total = case_when(
        !is.na(as.numeric(gear_hours)) & as.numeric(gear_hours) > 0 ~ as.numeric(gear_hours),
        !is.na(hours_fished) & !is.na(number_of_gear) ~ hours_fished * number_of_gear,
        TRUE ~ NA_real_
      ),
      dungeness_kept = replace_na(as.numeric(dungeness_kept), 0),
      red_rock_kept = replace_na(as.numeric(red_rock_kept), 0),
      trip_status = case_when(
        completed_trip=="1"~"Complete", completed_trip=="0"~"Incomplete", TRUE~NA_character_
      ),
      angler_final_int = case_when(population=="shore"~1L, population=="private_boat"~2L, TRUE~NA_integer_)
    ) |>
    filter(!is.na(fishing_time_total), fishing_time_total >= params$min_fishing_time) |>
    filter(if_else(population == "private_boat",
                   !is.na(gear_time_total) & gear_time_total > 0, TRUE))

  # --- SHORE EFFORT: Pair Float 20 + Float 17-21 gear counts ---
  dock_effort <- gh_effort |>
    filter(creel_area %in% c("Westport Docks Float 20","Westport Docks Float 17-21")) |>
    mutate(event_date = date,
           count_time_posix = as.POSIXct(paste(date,count_time), format="%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", tz="America/Los_Angeles")) |>
    filter(!is.na(count_time_posix))

  f20 <- dock_effort |> filter(creel_area=="Westport Docks Float 20") |>
    arrange(event_date,count_time_posix) |> group_by(event_date) |>
    mutate(count_sequence=row_number()) |> ungroup()

  f17 <- dock_effort |> filter(creel_area=="Westport Docks Float 17-21")

  if(nrow(f17) > 0) {
    f17_paired <- f17 |>
      left_join(f20 |> select(event_date,count_sequence,f20_time=count_time_posix),
                by="event_date", relationship="many-to-many") |>
      mutate(time_diff=abs(as.numeric(difftime(count_time_posix,f20_time,units="mins")))) |>
      group_by(event_date,survey_id,count_time) |> slice_min(time_diff,n=1,with_ties=FALSE) |> ungroup() |>
      select(event_date,count_sequence,f17_gear=total_gear_count)
  } else {
    f17_paired <- tibble(event_date=Date(),count_sequence=integer(),f17_gear=numeric())
  }

  shore_effort <- f20 |> select(event_date,count_sequence,f20_gear=total_gear_count) |>
    left_join(f17_paired, by=c("event_date","count_sequence")) |>
    mutate(f17_gear=replace_na(f17_gear,0), count_quantity=f20_gear+f17_gear,
           section_num=1, count_type="Gear Count", population="shore")

  # --- BOAT EFFORT ---
  boat_effort <- gh_effort |>
    filter(creel_area %in% c("Westport Boat Launch","Ocean Shores Boat Launch")) |>
    mutate(event_date = date,
           count_time_posix = as.POSIXct(paste(date,count_time), format="%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", tz="America/Los_Angeles"),
           count_quantity = as.numeric(boat_trailer_count)) |>
    filter(!is.na(count_time_posix), !is.na(count_quantity), count_quantity >= 0) |>
    arrange(event_date,count_time_posix) |> group_by(event_date) |>
    mutate(count_sequence=row_number()) |> ungroup() |>
    select(event_date,count_sequence,count_quantity) |>
    mutate(section_num=1, count_type="Trailer Count", population="private_boat")

  # --- COMMERCIAL TALLY ---
  comm_tally <- read_csv(here("input_files","wes_commercial_tally.csv"), show_col_types=FALSE) |>
    mutate(date = as.Date(date))

  cat(sprintf("\n  Shore effort obs: %d (%d days)\n", nrow(shore_effort), n_distinct(shore_effort$event_date)))
  cat(sprintf("  Boat effort obs: %d (%d days)\n", nrow(boat_effort), n_distinct(boat_effort$event_date)))
  cat(sprintf("  Commercial tally days: %d\n", nrow(comm_tally)))

  catch <- bind_rows(
    gh_interview |> filter(dungeness_kept>0) |>
      transmute(interview_id,event_date,population,species="Dungeness",fate="Kept",
                fish_count=as.integer(dungeness_kept),catch_group="Dungeness_Kept"),
    if(params$estimate_red_rock) {
      gh_interview |> filter(red_rock_kept>0) |>
        transmute(interview_id,event_date,population,species="Red_Rock",fate="Kept",
                  fish_count=as.integer(red_rock_kept),catch_group="Red_Rock_Kept")
    } else { tibble() }
  )

  return(list(
    shore_effort = shore_effort,
    boat_effort = boat_effort,
    interview = gh_interview,
    catch = catch,
    comm_tally = comm_tally,
    ll = tibble(centroid_lat=46.904, centroid_lon=-124.105)
  ))
}


# ===========================================================================
# 1.5 INGRESS/EGRESS DATA
# ===========================================================================

fetch_ie_data <- function(params) {
  cat("\n  Reading I/E data...\n")
  ie_file <- here("input_files", params$ie_data_file)
  if(!file.exists(ie_file)) {
    cat("  WARNING: I/E file not found at", ie_file, "\n")
    return(tibble(
      event_date = Date(), location_name = character(), population = character(),
      ie_crabber_hours = numeric(), n_intervals = integer(), max_present = numeric(),
      survey_hours = numeric(), total_arrivals = numeric(), total_departures = numeric(),
      mean_present = numeric(), L_effective = numeric()
    ))
  }

  ie_raw <- read_excel(ie_file, sheet = params$ie_sheet) |>
    mutate(event_date = as.Date(date))

  ie_shore <- ie_raw |>
    filter(location_name == params$ie_shore_location) |>
    mutate(
      crabbers_on = replace_na(as.numeric(crabbers_on), 0),
      crabbers_off = replace_na(as.numeric(crabbers_off), 0),
      crabber_flow = replace_na(as.numeric(crabber_flow), 0)
    ) |>
    group_by(event_date) |>
    summarise(
      location_name = first(location_name),
      ie_crabber_hours = sum(crabber_flow * 0.25),
      n_intervals = n(),
      max_present = max(crabber_flow),
      survey_hours = n() * 0.25,
      total_arrivals = sum(crabbers_on),
      total_departures = sum(crabbers_off),
      day_type = first(day_type),
      season = first(season),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    mutate(
      population = "shore",
      mean_present = ie_crabber_hours / survey_hours,
      L_effective = if_else(max_present > 0, ie_crabber_hours / max_present, 0)
    )

  ie_boat <- ie_raw |>
    filter(location_name == params$ie_boat_location) |>
    mutate(
      boats_in = replace_na(as.numeric(boats_in), 0),
      boats_out = replace_na(as.numeric(boats_out), 0),
      boat_flow = replace_na(as.numeric(boat_flow), 0)
    ) |>
    group_by(event_date) |>
    summarise(
      location_name = first(location_name),
      ie_crabber_hours = sum(boat_flow * 0.25),
      n_intervals = n(),
      max_present = max(boat_flow),
      survey_hours = n() * 0.25,
      total_arrivals = sum(boats_in),
      total_departures = sum(boats_out),
      day_type = first(day_type),
      season = first(season),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    mutate(
      population = "private_boat",
      mean_present = ie_crabber_hours / survey_hours,
      L_effective = if_else(max_present > 0, ie_crabber_hours / max_present, 0)
    )

  ie_all <- bind_rows(ie_shore, ie_boat) |>
    filter(ie_crabber_hours > 0)

  cat(sprintf("  I/E survey days: %d shore (WDF20), %d boat (WBL)\n",
              sum(ie_all$population == "shore"),
              sum(ie_all$population == "private_boat")))
  if(nrow(ie_all) > 0)
    cat(sprintf("  Date range: %s to %s\n", min(ie_all$event_date), max(ie_all$event_date)))

  if(nrow(ie_all |> filter(population == "shore")) > 0) {
    shore_ie <- ie_all |> filter(population == "shore")
    cat(sprintf("  Shore L_effective: mean=%.1f hrs (range %.1f–%.1f)\n",
                mean(shore_ie$L_effective), min(shore_ie$L_effective), max(shore_ie$L_effective)))
  }

  return(ie_all)
}


# ===========================================================================
# 1.6 L_EFFECTIVE MODEL — Regression with uncertainty propagation
#
# Fits a
# regression of log(L_effective) on day-of-year (quadratic) and day type.
# This captures the seasonal gradient WITHIN sub-seasons and provides
# per-day prediction uncertainty for propagation into the Stan model.
#
# Returns: list with
#   $predict_fn: function(event_date, day_type) -> tibble(L_mu, L_sigma)
#   $model: the fitted lm object
#   $detail: per-I/E-day data
#   $summary: model coefficients and fit statistics
# ===========================================================================

estimate_L_effective <- function(ie_data, pot_open_date, params) {
  cat("\n  Fitting L_effective regression from historical I/E data...\n")

  ie_shore <- ie_data |>
    filter(population == "shore", L_effective > 0)

  if(nrow(ie_shore) < 3) {
    cat("  WARNING: Fewer than 3 shore I/E days. Cannot fit L_effective model.\n")
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Prepare regression data
  ie_shore <- ie_shore |>
    mutate(
      yday = yday(event_date),
      day_type_group = if_else(day_type %in% c("Weekend", "weekend"), "weekend", "weekday"),
      log_L = log(L_effective)
    )

  n_ie <- nrow(ie_shore)
  cat(sprintf("  I/E observations for regression: %d\n", n_ie))

  if(n_ie >= params$ie_min_obs_for_regression) {
    # --- Fit quadratic regression on day-of-year + day type ---
    # log(L_effective) = b0 + b1*yday + b2*yday^2 + b3*weekend + error
    L_fit <- lm(log_L ~ poly(yday, 2) + day_type_group, data = ie_shore)

    cat("  L_effective regression summary:\n")
    cat(sprintf("    R² = %.3f, residual SE = %.3f (log scale)\n",
                summary(L_fit)$r.squared, sigma(L_fit)))
    cat(sprintf("    Coefficients:\n"))
    coefs <- coef(L_fit)
    for(nm in names(coefs)) {
      cat(sprintf("      %s: %.4f\n", nm, coefs[nm]))
    }

    sigma_resid <- sigma(L_fit)  # residual SD on log scale

    # Create prediction function
    predict_L <- function(event_dates, day_types) {
      newdata <- tibble(
        yday = yday(event_dates),
        day_type_group = if_else(day_types %in% c("weekend","holiday"), "weekend", "weekday")
      )
      pred <- predict(L_fit, newdata = newdata, se.fit = TRUE)

      tibble(
        L_mu = exp(pred$fit),  # predicted median on natural scale
        # Total prediction uncertainty = sqrt(regression SE² + residual variance)
        L_sigma = pmax(sqrt(pred$se.fit^2 + sigma_resid^2), 0.1),
        L_fit_only = exp(pred$fit),  # same as L_mu (for diagnostics)
        L_se_regression = pred$se.fit,
        L_se_total = pmax(sqrt(pred$se.fit^2 + sigma_resid^2), 0.1)
      )
    }

  } else {
    # --- Fallback: grand mean with empirical SD ---
    cat(sprintf("  Fewer than %d I/E obs — using grand mean fallback.\n",
                params$ie_min_obs_for_regression))
    grand_mean_log <- mean(ie_shore$log_L)
    grand_sd_log <- max(sd(ie_shore$log_L), 0.2)

    predict_L <- function(event_dates, day_types) {
      n <- length(event_dates)
      tibble(
        L_mu = rep(exp(grand_mean_log), n),
        L_sigma = rep(grand_sd_log, n),
        L_fit_only = rep(exp(grand_mean_log), n),
        L_se_regression = rep(grand_sd_log / sqrt(nrow(ie_shore)), n),
        L_se_total = rep(grand_sd_log, n)
      )
    }
    L_fit <- NULL
  }

  # Predict for I/E days (for diagnostics)
  ie_pred <- predict_L(ie_shore$event_date, ie_shore$day_type)
  ie_shore <- bind_cols(ie_shore, ie_pred |> rename(pred_L_mu = L_mu, pred_L_sigma = L_sigma))

  cat(sprintf("\n  Predicted L_effective range: %.1f–%.1f hrs\n",
              min(ie_shore$pred_L_mu), max(ie_shore$pred_L_mu)))
  cat(sprintf("  Prediction uncertainty (sigma on log scale): %.2f–%.2f\n",
              min(ie_shore$pred_L_sigma), max(ie_shore$pred_L_sigma)))

  result <- list(
    predict_fn = predict_L,
    model = L_fit,
    detail = ie_shore |> select(event_date, day_type, day_type_group, yday,
                                 ie_crabber_hours, max_present, L_effective,
                                 pred_L_mu, pred_L_sigma),
    n_obs = n_ie,
    method = if(!is.null(L_fit)) "regression" else "grand_mean"
  )

  return(result)
}


# ===========================================================================
# 2. PREP DAYS — Build calendar with L_mu and L_sigma per day
#
# Stores both L_mu (predicted median) and L_prior_sigma
# lookup value, store both L_mu (predicted median) and L_prior_sigma
# (prediction uncertainty on log scale) for each day. These feed into
# the Stan model where L becomes a parameter.
# ===========================================================================

prep_days_crab <- function(date_begin, date_end, weekends, holiday_dates, period_pe, sections,
                           L_eff_model = NULL) {
  date_begin <- as.Date(date_begin); date_end <- as.Date(date_end)
  days <- tibble(
    event_date = seq.Date(date_begin, date_end, by="day"),
    day = weekdays(event_date),
    day_type = case_when(
      event_date %in% holiday_dates ~ "holiday",
      day %in% weekends ~ "weekend", TRUE ~ "weekday"),
    day_type_num_weekend = as.integer(day_type %in% c("weekend","holiday")),
    day_type_num_holiday = as.integer(day_type == "holiday"),
    week = as.numeric(format(event_date,"%W")),
    month = as.numeric(format(event_date,"%m")),
    year = as.numeric(format(event_date,"%Y")),
    period = case_when(
      period_pe == "month" ~ as.numeric(format(event_date, "%m")),
      period_pe == "week"  ~ as.numeric(format(event_date, "%W")),
      TRUE ~ as.numeric(format(event_date, "%W"))
    ),
    day_index = as.integer(seq_along(event_date)),
    week_index = as.integer(factor(
      paste(year, sprintf("%02d", week)),
      levels = unique(paste(year, sprintf("%02d", week)))
    )),
    month_index = as.integer(factor(paste(year,sprintf("%02d",month)),
                  levels=unique(paste(year,sprintf("%02d",month))))),
    day_length = NA_real_
  )

  # Civil twilight day length
  sun <- suncalc::getSunlightTimes(
    date = days$event_date,
    lat = 46.904, lon = -124.105,
    tz = "America/Los_Angeles"
  )
  days$day_length <- as.numeric(difftime(sun$dusk, sun$dawn, units = "hours"))
  days$day_length <- pmax(pmin(days$day_length, 16.0), 9.0)
  days$day_length_civil_twilight <- days$day_length

  # --- L_effective regression predictions ---
  # Store L_mu (median on natural scale) and L_prior_sigma (uncertainty on log scale)
  # Default: civil twilight with moderate uncertainty
  days$L_mu <- days$day_length
  days$L_prior_sigma <- rep(0.3, nrow(days))  # default ~30% uncertainty

  if(!is.null(L_eff_model)) {
    L_pred <- L_eff_model$predict_fn(days$event_date, days$day_type)
    days$L_mu <- L_pred$L_mu
    days$L_prior_sigma <- L_pred$L_sigma
    days$day_length <- L_pred$L_mu  # for PE method: use predicted median
  }

  for(s in sections) days[[paste0("open_section_",s)]] <- TRUE
  days
}


# ===========================================================================
# 3. SUMMARIZE DATA — Filter to population × sub-season
# ===========================================================================

prep_population_summary <- function(dwg, population_name, date_start, date_end, params) {
  ds <- as.Date(date_start); de <- as.Date(date_end)
  summ <- list()

  if(population_name == "shore") {
    summ$effort_index <- dwg$shore_effort |> filter(between(event_date, ds, de))
  } else if(population_name == "private_boat") {
    summ$effort_index <- dwg$boat_effort |> filter(between(event_date, ds, de))
  }

  int_pop <- dwg$interview |>
    filter(population == population_name, between(event_date, ds, de))

  catch_wide <- dwg$catch |>
    filter(population == population_name) |>
    group_by(interview_id, catch_group) |>
    summarise(fish_count=sum(fish_count), .groups="drop") |>
    pivot_wider(names_from=catch_group, values_from=fish_count, values_fill=0)

  summ$interview <- int_pop |>
    left_join(catch_wide, by="interview_id") |>
    mutate(across(any_of(catch_groups), ~replace_na(.,0)))

  ratio_data <- summ$interview |> filter(!is.na(number_of_gear), number_of_gear>0, angler_count>0)
  summ$crabbers_per_gear <- if(nrow(ratio_data)>0) sum(ratio_data$angler_count)/sum(ratio_data$number_of_gear) else 1.0

  # Compute empirical gear-per-crabber ratio for R_G prior
  summ$empirical_R_G <- if(nrow(ratio_data)>0) sum(ratio_data$number_of_gear)/sum(ratio_data$angler_count) else 1.3

  cat(sprintf("\n  %s [%s to %s]: %d effort obs, %d interviews, crab/gear=%.2f, R_G_empirical=%.2f\n",
              population_name, ds, de, nrow(summ$effort_index), nrow(summ$interview),
              summ$crabbers_per_gear, summ$empirical_R_G))

  return(summ)
}


# ===========================================================================
# 4. PE METHOD — (unchanged from v1)
# ===========================================================================

run_pe <- function(summ, days, params, population_name) {
  results <- list()
  is_boat <- str_detect(population_name, "private_boat")
  use_gear_hrs <- is_boat && isTRUE(params$boat_use_gear_hours)

  daily_effort <- summ$effort_index |>
    filter(count_sequence <= params$bss_max_count_seq) |>
    group_by(event_date, section_num) |>
    summarise(mean_count=mean(count_quantity), n_counts=n(), .groups="drop") |>
    mutate(est_crabbers = mean_count * summ$crabbers_per_gear) |>
    left_join(days |> select(event_date,day_type,day_length,period), by="event_date")

  if(use_gear_hrs) {
    ratio_data <- summ$interview |>
      filter(!is.na(number_of_gear), number_of_gear > 0, angler_count > 0)
    gear_per_group <- if(nrow(ratio_data) > 0) mean(ratio_data$number_of_gear) else 4.0
    daily_effort <- daily_effort |>
      mutate(est_daily_effort = mean_count * gear_per_group * 24)
    cat(sprintf("  PE %s: gear_per_group=%.1f, L=24h (gear-hours)\n", population_name, gear_per_group))
  } else {
    daily_effort <- daily_effort |>
      mutate(est_daily_effort = est_crabbers * day_length)
  }

  total_days_strat <- days |> filter(open_section_1) |>
    group_by(period, day_type) |> summarise(n_total_days=n(), .groups="drop")

  effort_strat <- daily_effort |>
    group_by(section_num, period, day_type) |>
    summarise(mean_daily=mean(est_daily_effort,na.rm=TRUE),
              sd_daily=sd(est_daily_effort,na.rm=TRUE),
              n_sampled=n(), .groups="drop") |>
    left_join(total_days_strat, by=c("period","day_type")) |>
    mutate(est_total = mean_daily * n_total_days,
           se_total = sqrt((n_total_days^2)*replace_na(sd_daily^2,0)/pmax(n_sampled,1)))

  results$effort_total <- sum(effort_strat$est_total, na.rm=TRUE)
  results$effort_se <- sqrt(sum(effort_strat$se_total^2, na.rm=TRUE))

  for(cg in catch_groups) {
    if(!cg %in% names(summ$interview)) { results[[cg]] <- 0; next }
    hrs_col <- if(use_gear_hrs) "gear_time_total" else "fishing_time_total"
    daily_cpue <- summ$interview |>
      filter(!is.na(.data[[hrs_col]]), .data[[hrs_col]] > 0) |>
      group_by(event_date, section_num) |>
      summarise(catch=sum(.data[[cg]],na.rm=TRUE), hrs=sum(.data[[hrs_col]],na.rm=TRUE),
                n_int=n(), .groups="drop") |>
      mutate(cpue=if_else(hrs>0, catch/hrs, 0)) |>
      left_join(days |> select(event_date,day_type,period), by="event_date")
    cpue_strat <- daily_cpue |>
      group_by(section_num, period, day_type) |>
      summarise(mean_cpue=weighted.mean(cpue,w=n_int,na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop")
    catch_strat <- effort_strat |>
      left_join(cpue_strat, by=c("section_num","period","day_type")) |>
      mutate(est_catch = est_total * replace_na(mean_cpue, 0))
    results[[cg]] <- sum(catch_strat$est_catch, na.rm=TRUE)
  }

  effort_unit <- if(use_gear_hrs) "gear-hrs" else "crabber-hrs"
  rr_str <- if(params$estimate_red_rock) sprintf(", RR=%s", format(round(results$Red_Rock_Kept),big.mark=",")) else ""
  cat(sprintf("  PE %s: Effort=%s %s, Dung=%s%s\n", population_name,
              format(round(results$effort_total),big.mark=","), effort_unit,
              format(round(results$Dungeness_Kept),big.mark=","), rr_str))
  return(results)
}


# ===========================================================================
# 5. BSS PREP — Build Stan data list for crab_bss_pooled.stan
#
# ADAPTIVE AR RESOLUTION: Selects daily, weekly, or monthly AR based on
# effort data density. Dense data → daily AR for smooth interpolation.
# Sparse data → coarser resolution to avoid poorly-identified AR dynamics.
#
# Also includes: data-driven R_G prior, L_effective as parameter (shore),
# informative R_T prior, tightened Cauchy scales, no interview cap.
# ===========================================================================

prep_bss_crab <- function(days, summ, est_catch_group, params, population_name,
                          ie_data = NULL) {

  eff <- summ$effort_index |> filter(count_sequence <= params$bss_max_count_seq)
  D <- nrow(days); G <- 1L; S <- 1L

  eff_d <- eff |> left_join(days |> select(event_date,day_index), by="event_date") |> filter(!is.na(day_index))

  is_shore <- (population_name == "shore")
  use_gear_hrs <- !is_shore && isTRUE(params$boat_use_gear_hours)

  # --- Adaptive AR temporal resolution ---
  # Assess data density and select the finest resolution the data supports.
  # This follows the principle that the AR(1) needs enough observations
  # distributed across its time steps to identify phi and sigma_eps
  # (Staton et al. 2017; Conn 2002).
  n_effort_days <- n_distinct(eff_d$day_index)
  coverage <- n_effort_days / D
  n_weeks <- max(days$week_index)
  obs_per_week <- n_effort_days / n_weeks

  if(coverage >= params$ar_daily_min_coverage && n_effort_days >= params$ar_daily_min_obs) {
    ar_resolution <- "daily"
    P_n <- D
    pvec <- days$day_index
  } else if(obs_per_week >= params$ar_weekly_min_per_week && n_weeks >= 3) {
    ar_resolution <- "weekly"
    P_n <- n_weeks
    pvec <- days$week_index
  } else {
    ar_resolution <- "monthly"
    P_n <- max(days$month_index)
    pvec <- days$month_index
  }

  cat(sprintf("  AR resolution: %s (P_n=%d) | coverage=%.0f%% (%d/%d days), %.1f obs/week\n",
              ar_resolution, P_n, coverage*100, n_effort_days, D, obs_per_week))

  # --- Interview data (all interviews used, no subsampling) ---
  int_cg <- summ$interview |>
    mutate(fish_count = .data[[est_catch_group]])

  if(use_gear_hrs) {
    int_cg <- int_cg |> filter(!is.na(gear_time_total), gear_time_total > 0)
    h_vec_name <- "gear_time_total"
    cat(sprintf("  Boat CPUE: using gear-hours (gear_time_total)\n"))
  } else {
    int_cg <- int_cg |> filter(!is.na(fishing_time_total), fishing_time_total > 0)
    h_vec_name <- "fishing_time_total"
  }

  int_d <- int_cg |> left_join(days |> select(event_date,day_index), by="event_date") |>
    filter(!is.na(day_index)) |> distinct(interview_id, .keep_all=TRUE)

  intA <- int_d |> filter(!is.na(number_of_gear), number_of_gear>0, angler_count>0)

  cat(sprintf("  Using ALL %d interviews (no subsampling)\n", nrow(int_d)))

  # --- Day length ---
  if(use_gear_hrs) {
    L_data_vec <- rep(24.0, D)
    L_sigma_vec <- rep(0.01, D)
    estimate_L_flag <- 0L
  } else if(is_shore) {
    L_data_vec <- days$L_mu
    L_sigma_vec <- days$L_prior_sigma
    estimate_L_flag <- 1L
    cat(sprintf("  L_effective as PARAMETER: L_mu range [%.1f, %.1f], sigma range [%.2f, %.2f]\n",
                min(L_data_vec), max(L_data_vec), min(L_sigma_vec), max(L_sigma_vec)))
  } else {
    L_data_vec <- days$day_length
    L_sigma_vec <- rep(0.01, D)
    estimate_L_flag <- 0L
  }

  # --- Sparse effort observation counts ---
  n_gear <- if(is_shore) nrow(eff_d) else 0L
  n_trailer <- if(!is_shore) nrow(eff_d) else 0L
  n_effort_obs <- n_gear + n_trailer
  cat(sprintf("  Sparse eps_E_H: %d effort obs\n", n_effort_obs))

  # --- I/E observations ---
  ie_match <- tibble(event_date = Date(), ie_crabber_hours = numeric())
  if(!is.null(ie_data) && nrow(ie_data) > 0) {
    ie_pop <- if(is_shore) "shore" else "private_boat"
    ie_match <- ie_data |>
      filter(population == ie_pop) |>
      inner_join(days |> select(event_date, day_index), by = "event_date") |>
      filter(!is.na(day_index), ie_crabber_hours > 0)
  }

  IE_n <- nrow(ie_match)
  if(IE_n > 0) {
    cat(sprintf("  I/E observations: %d days (crabber-hrs range: %.0f–%.0f)\n",
                IE_n, min(ie_match$ie_crabber_hours), max(ie_match$ie_crabber_hours)))
  } else {
    cat("  I/E observations: 0\n")
  }

  # --- Data-driven R_G prior ---
  R_G_empirical <- summ$empirical_R_G
  R_G_prior_sigma <- 0.3
  cat(sprintf("  R_G prior = Lognormal(log(%.2f), %.2f) [data-driven]\n",
              R_G_empirical, R_G_prior_sigma))

  mu_E_prior <- if(is_shore) log(25) else if(use_gear_hrs) log(20) else log(10)
  mu_C_prior <- if(use_gear_hrs) log(0.1) else log(0.5)

  stan_data <- list(
    D=D, G=G, S=S,
    P_n=P_n, period=pvec,
    w=days$day_type_num_weekend, holiday=days$day_type_num_holiday,
    O=array(1.0, dim=c(D,S,G)),

    L_data = L_data_vec,
    estimate_L = estimate_L_flag,
    L_prior_sigma = L_sigma_vec,

    n_effort_obs = n_effort_obs,

    Gear_n = n_gear,
    day_Gear = if(is_shore) eff_d$day_index else integer(0),
    section_Gear = if(is_shore) rep(1L,nrow(eff_d)) else integer(0),
    Gear_I = if(is_shore) as.integer(eff_d$count_quantity) else integer(0),

    T_n = n_trailer,
    day_T = if(!is_shore) eff_d$day_index else integer(0),
    section_T = if(!is_shore) rep(1L,nrow(eff_d)) else integer(0),
    T_I = if(!is_shore) as.integer(eff_d$count_quantity) else integer(0),

    Crab_n=0L, day_Crab=integer(0), section_Crab=integer(0),
    Crab_I=integer(0), p_I_crab=1.0,

    IntC=nrow(int_d), day_IntC=int_d$day_index, gear_IntC=rep(1L,nrow(int_d)),
    section_IntC=rep(1L,nrow(int_d)), c=as.integer(int_d$fish_count),
    h=int_d[[h_vec_name]],

    IntA_gear = if(is_shore) nrow(intA) else 0L,
    Gear_A = if(is_shore) as.integer(intA$number_of_gear) else integer(0),
    A_A_gear = if(is_shore) as.integer(intA$angler_count) else integer(0),

    IntA_trailer = if(!is_shore) nrow(intA) else 0L,
    T_A_int = if(!is_shore) rep(1L, nrow(intA)) else integer(0),
    A_A_trailer = if(!is_shore) as.integer(intA$angler_count) else integer(0),

    IE_n = IE_n,
    day_IE = if(IE_n > 0) ie_match$day_index else integer(0),
    section_IE = if(IE_n > 0) rep(1L, IE_n) else integer(0),
    IE_crabber_hours = if(IE_n > 0) ie_match$ie_crabber_hours else numeric(0),

    # Tightened Cauchy scales
    value_cauchyDF_sigma_eps_E=1, value_cauchyDF_sigma_r_E=1,
    value_cauchyDF_sigma_eps_C=1, value_cauchyDF_sigma_r_C=1,
    value_betashape_phi_E_scaled=2, value_betashape_phi_C_scaled=2,
    value_normal_sigma_B1=1, value_normal_sigma_B2=1,
    value_normal_sigma_B1_C=1,
    value_normal_mu_mu_C=mu_C_prior, value_normal_sigma_mu_C=2,
    value_normal_mu_mu_E=mu_E_prior, value_normal_sigma_mu_E=2,
    value_cauchyDF_sigma_mu_C=1, value_cauchyDF_sigma_mu_E=1,

    R_G_prior_mu = R_G_empirical,
    R_G_prior_sigma = R_G_prior_sigma,
    R_T_alpha = 5.0,
    R_T_beta = 1.0
  )

  # Store AR resolution for downstream reporting
  attr(stan_data, "ar_resolution") <- ar_resolution
  stan_data
}


# ===========================================================================
# 6. COMMERCIAL/CHARTER CENSUS (unchanged from v1)
# ===========================================================================

estimate_comm_charter <- function(dwg, params) {
  cat("\n--- Commercial/Charter Census Estimation (Stratified) ---\n")
  census_start <- as.Date(params$census_start_date)
  census_end   <- as.Date(params$census_end_date)

  tally <- dwg$comm_tally |> filter(between(date, census_start, census_end))
  comm_int <- dwg$interview |>
    filter(population == "comm_charter", between(event_date, census_start, census_end))

  if(nrow(comm_int) == 0 || nrow(tally) == 0) {
    cat("  No commercial/charter data available.\n")
    result <- list(effort_total=0, Dungeness_Kept=0)
    if(params$estimate_red_rock) result$Red_Rock_Kept <- 0
    return(result)
  }

  mean_dung_per_vessel <- sum(comm_int$dungeness_kept) / nrow(comm_int)
  cat(sprintf("  Tally days: %d, Interviews: %d\n", nrow(tally), nrow(comm_int)))
  cat(sprintf("  Mean Dungeness/vessel: %.1f\n", mean_dung_per_vessel))

  daily_est <- tally |>
    mutate(
      day_of_week = weekdays(date),
      day_type = case_when(
        date %in% crabbing_holiday_dates ~ "weekend",
        day_of_week %in% params$days_wkend ~ "weekend",
        TRUE ~ "weekday"
      ),
      total_comm_charter = commercial_tally + charter_tally,
      est_dung = total_comm_charter * mean_dung_per_vessel
    )

  census_calendar <- tibble(
    date = seq.Date(census_start, census_end, by = "day"),
    day_of_week = weekdays(date),
    day_type = case_when(
      date %in% crabbing_holiday_dates ~ "weekend",
      day_of_week %in% params$days_wkend ~ "weekend",
      TRUE ~ "weekday"
    )
  )

  total_by_type <- census_calendar |> count(day_type, name = "n_total_days")
  sampled_by_type <- daily_est |> count(day_type, name = "n_sampled_days")

  strat <- total_by_type |>
    left_join(sampled_by_type, by = "day_type") |>
    mutate(n_sampled_days = replace_na(n_sampled_days, 0))

  strat_harvest <- daily_est |>
    group_by(day_type) |>
    summarise(mean_daily_dung = mean(est_dung), mean_daily_vessels = mean(total_comm_charter), .groups = "drop")

  strat <- strat |>
    left_join(strat_harvest, by = "day_type") |>
    mutate(est_total_dung = mean_daily_dung * n_total_days,
           est_total_vessels = mean_daily_vessels * n_total_days)

  total_dung <- sum(strat$est_total_dung)
  total_vessels <- sum(strat$est_total_vessels)

  result <- list(Dungeness_Kept = total_dung, effort_total = total_vessels,
                 daily_est = daily_est, strat_detail = strat)
  cat(sprintf("\n  Est Dungeness (stratified): %s\n", format(round(total_dung), big.mark=",")))
  return(result)
}


# ===========================================================================
# 7. RUN EVERYTHING
# ===========================================================================

# ---- 7.0 LOAD DATA ----
timer_start("1_load_data")
cat("\n", strrep("=",60), "\n LOADING DATA\n", strrep("=",60), "\n")
dwg <- fetch_crab_data(params)
ie_data <- fetch_ie_data(params)

# --- Fit L_effective regression ---
L_eff_model <- NULL
if(isTRUE(params$use_ie_day_length) && nrow(ie_data) > 0) {
  L_eff_model <- estimate_L_effective(ie_data, params$pot_open_date, params)
  if(!is.null(L_eff_model)) {
    # Save regression diagnostics
    if(!is.null(L_eff_model$detail)) {
      write.csv(L_eff_model$detail,
                file.path(output_dir, "L_effective_ie_detail.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
    }
  }
}
timer_stop("1_load_data")


# ---- 7.1 DIAGNOSTIC PLOTS ----
timer_start("2_diagnostic_plots")
cat("\n", strrep("=",60), "\n DIAGNOSTIC PLOTS\n", strrep("=",60), "\n")

days_full <- prep_days_crab(params$est_date_start, params$est_date_end,
                            params$days_wkend, crabbing_holiday_dates,
                            params$period_pe, params$sections, L_eff_model = L_eff_model)

# Plot 1: Shore gear count timeseries
p_shore_effort <- dwg$shore_effort |>
  group_by(event_date) |>
  summarise(total_gear = sum(count_quantity), n_counts = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(day_type = classify_day_type(event_date)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = event_date, y = total_gear, color = day_type, size = n_counts)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.Date(params$pot_open_date), linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.5) +
  annotate("text", x = as.Date(params$pot_open_date) + 5, y = Inf, label = "Pots open",
           hjust = 0, vjust = 1.5, size = 3, color = "red") +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(1,3), breaks = 1:3, name = "Counts/day") +
  labs(title = "Shore: Daily Gear Count (Docks F20 + F17-21)",
       x = "Date", y = "Total gear count", color = "Day type") +
  theme_bw()
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "plot_shore_effort_timeseries.png"), p_shore_effort, width = 10, height = 6)

# Plot 2: Boat trailer count timeseries
p_boat_effort <- dwg$boat_effort |>
  group_by(event_date) |>
  summarise(total_trailers = sum(count_quantity), n_counts = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(day_type = classify_day_type(event_date)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = event_date, y = total_trailers, color = day_type)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.Date(params$pot_open_date), linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.5) +
  labs(title = "Private Boat: Daily Trailer Count", x = "Date", y = "Trailers", color = "Day type") +
  theme_bw()
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "plot_boat_effort_timeseries.png"), p_boat_effort, width = 10, height = 6)

# Plot 3: CPUE by population
cpue_data <- dwg$interview |>
  filter(fishing_time_total > 0, dungeness_kept >= 0) |>
  mutate(cpue = dungeness_kept / fishing_time_total) |>
  group_by(event_date, population) |>
  summarise(mean_cpue = mean(cpue), n_int = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(day_type = classify_day_type(event_date)) |>
  filter(population %in% c("shore", "private_boat"))

p_cpue <- cpue_data |>
  ggplot(aes(x = event_date, y = mean_cpue, color = day_type)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, size = 1.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", span = 0.3, se = TRUE, color = "grey30") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = as.Date(params$pot_open_date), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  facet_wrap(~population, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(title = "Dungeness CPUE by Population", x = "Date", y = "Mean CPUE", color = "Day type") +
  theme_bw()
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "plot_cpue_timeseries.png"), p_cpue, width = 10, height = 8)

# Plot 4: Gear counts by month and day type (boxplot)
p_effort_month <- dwg$shore_effort |>
  group_by(event_date) |>
  summarise(total_gear = sum(count_quantity), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(day_type = classify_day_type(event_date),
         month_label = factor(format(event_date, "%Y-%m"))) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = month_label, y = total_gear, fill = day_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Shore Gear Counts by Month and Day Type",
       x = "Month", y = "Daily gear count", fill = "Day type") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "plot_effort_by_month.png"), p_effort_month, width = 12, height = 6)

# L_effective regression diagnostic plot
if(!is.null(L_eff_model) && !is.null(L_eff_model$detail) && nrow(L_eff_model$detail) >= 3) {
  # Predict L for a full year of days for visualization
  viz_dates <- seq.Date(as.Date("2024-01-01"), as.Date("2024-12-31"), by = "day")
  viz_pred <- L_eff_model$predict_fn(viz_dates, rep("weekday", length(viz_dates)))
  viz_pred_wkend <- L_eff_model$predict_fn(viz_dates, rep("weekend", length(viz_dates)))

  p_L_regression <- ggplot() +
    geom_ribbon(data = tibble(date = viz_dates, lo = viz_pred$L_mu * exp(-1.96 * viz_pred$L_sigma),
                              hi = viz_pred$L_mu * exp(1.96 * viz_pred$L_sigma)),
                aes(x = date, ymin = lo, ymax = hi), alpha = 0.15, fill = "steelblue") +
    geom_line(data = tibble(date = viz_dates, L = viz_pred$L_mu),
              aes(x = date, y = L, color = "Weekday prediction"), linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_line(data = tibble(date = viz_dates, L = viz_pred_wkend$L_mu),
              aes(x = date, y = L, color = "Weekend prediction"), linewidth = 0.8, linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_point(data = L_eff_model$detail,
               aes(x = event_date, y = L_effective, shape = day_type_group), size = 3) +
    labs(title = "L_effective Regression (log-scale quadratic + day type)",
         subtitle = sprintf("Method: %s | n=%d I/E days | Shaded = 95%% prediction interval",
                            L_eff_model$method, L_eff_model$n_obs),
         x = "Date", y = "L_effective (hours)", color = "Prediction", shape = "I/E day type") +
    theme_bw()
  ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "plot_L_effective_regression.png"), p_L_regression, width = 12, height = 6)
}

# Day length comparison (civil twilight vs regression)
p_day_length <- days_full |>
  ggplot(aes(x = event_date)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = day_length_civil_twilight, color = "Civil twilight"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = L_mu * exp(-1.96 * L_prior_sigma),
                  ymax = L_mu * exp(1.96 * L_prior_sigma)),
              alpha = 0.15, fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_line(aes(y = L_mu, color = "I/E L_effective (regression)"), linewidth = 0.8) +
  labs(title = "Day Length with Uncertainty",
       subtitle = "Shaded band = 95% prior interval for L (propagated into Stan model)",
       x = "Date", y = "Day length (hours)", color = "Method") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Civil twilight" = "grey60", "I/E L_effective (regression)" = "steelblue")) +
  theme_bw()
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "plot_day_length_comparison.png"), p_day_length, width = 10, height = 5)

cat("  Diagnostic plots saved.\n")
timer_stop("2_diagnostic_plots")


# ---- 7.1b I/E ANALYSIS ----
cat("\n", strrep("=",60), "\n I/E ANALYSIS\n", strrep("=",60), "\n")

if(nrow(ie_data) > 0) {
  ie_validation <- ie_data |>
    filter(population == "shore") |>
    left_join(
      dwg$shore_effort |>
        group_by(event_date) |>
        summarise(mean_gear = mean(count_quantity), n_counts = n(), .groups = "drop"),
      by = "event_date"
    ) |>
    filter(!is.na(mean_gear), mean_gear > 0)

  if(nrow(ie_validation) > 0) {
    ie_sun <- suncalc::getSunlightTimes(
      date = ie_validation$event_date, lat = 46.904, lon = -124.105, tz = "America/Los_Angeles"
    )
    ie_validation$day_length_ct <- pmax(pmin(
      as.numeric(difftime(ie_sun$dusk, ie_sun$dawn, units = "hours")), 16.0), 9.0)

    summ_shore_full <- prep_population_summary(dwg, "shore", params$est_date_start, params$est_date_end, params)
    cpg <- summ_shore_full$crabbers_per_gear

    ie_validation <- ie_validation |>
      mutate(
        gear_est_crabber_hrs = mean_gear * cpg * day_length_ct,
        f_temporal = ie_crabber_hours / gear_est_crabber_hrs,
        pct_error = (gear_est_crabber_hrs - ie_crabber_hours) / ie_crabber_hours * 100
      )

    cat("\n  I/E vs Gear-Count Comparison (paired days):\n")
    for(i in 1:nrow(ie_validation)) {
      r <- ie_validation[i,]
      cat(sprintf("  %-12s %-8s IE=%.0f Gear_est=%.0f f=%.2f\n",
                  as.character(r$event_date), r$day_type, r$ie_crabber_hours,
                  r$gear_est_crabber_hrs, r$f_temporal))
    }
    write.csv(ie_validation |>
      select(event_date, day_type, ie_crabber_hours, max_present, mean_present,
             L_effective, mean_gear, n_counts, gear_est_crabber_hrs, f_temporal, pct_error),
      file.path(output_dir, "ie_analysis.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  }
} else {
  cat("  No I/E data available.\n")
}


# ---- 7.2 PE ESTIMATES ----
timer_start("3_PE_estimates")
cat("\n", strrep("=",60), "\n PE ESTIMATES\n", strrep("=",60), "\n")

pe_all <- list()
for(pop in c("shore","private_boat")) {
  for(ss in list(subseason_1, subseason_2)) {
    label <- paste0(pop, "_", ss$name)
    days_ss <- prep_days_crab(ss$start, ss$end, params$days_wkend, crabbing_holiday_dates,
                              params$period_pe, params$sections, L_eff_model = L_eff_model)
    summ_ss <- prep_population_summary(dwg, pop, ss$start, ss$end, params)
    pe_all[[label]] <- run_pe(summ_ss, days_ss, params, label)
  }
}
timer_stop("3_PE_estimates")


# ---- 7.4 COMMERCIAL/CHARTER ----
timer_start("4_commercial_charter")
pe_all$comm_charter <- estimate_comm_charter(dwg, params)
timer_stop("4_commercial_charter")


# ---- 7.5 PE PORT TOTALS ----
cat("\n", strrep("=",60), "\n PE PORT TOTALS\n", strrep("=",60), "\n")

component_names <- c("Shore (ring-net)","Shore (all-gear)","Private Boat (ring-net)",
                     "Private Boat (all-gear)","Commercial/Charter","PORT TOTAL")
component_keys <- c("shore_ring_net_only","shore_all_gear",
                    "private_boat_ring_net_only","private_boat_all_gear","comm_charter")

pe_summary <- tibble(
  Component = component_names,
  Effort_hrs = c(sapply(component_keys, function(k) pe_all[[k]]$effort_total), NA),
  Dungeness = c(sapply(component_keys, function(k) pe_all[[k]]$Dungeness_Kept), NA)
)
pe_summary$Effort_hrs[6] <- sum(pe_summary$Effort_hrs[1:5], na.rm=TRUE)
pe_summary$Dungeness[6] <- sum(pe_summary$Dungeness[1:5], na.rm=TRUE)

if(params$estimate_red_rock) {
  pe_summary$Red_Rock <- c(
    sapply(component_keys, function(k) pe_all[[k]]$Red_Rock_Kept %||% 0), NA)
  pe_summary$Red_Rock[6] <- sum(pe_summary$Red_Rock[1:5], na.rm=TRUE)
}

print(pe_summary |> mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(.))))
write.csv(pe_summary, file.path(output_dir, "pe_port_summary.csv"), row.names=FALSE)


# ---- 7.6 BSS MODEL RUNS ----
timer_start("5_BSS_model_runs")
cat("\n", strrep("=",60), "\n BSS MODEL RUNS (Adaptive AR)\n", strrep("=",60), "\n")

bss_catch_groups <- catch_groups
bss_all <- list()
ar_resolutions <- list()  # track AR resolution per fit

for(cg in bss_catch_groups) {
  for(pop in c("shore","private_boat")) {
    for(ss in list(subseason_1, subseason_2)) {
      label <- paste0(pop, "_", ss$name, "_", cg)
      cat(sprintf("\n--- BSS: %s ---\n", label))

      days_ss <- prep_days_crab(ss$start, ss$end, params$days_wkend, crabbing_holiday_dates,
                                params$period_pe, params$sections, L_eff_model = L_eff_model)
      summ_ss <- prep_population_summary(dwg, pop, ss$start, ss$end, params)

      n_int <- nrow(summ_ss$interview)
      n_eff <- nrow(summ_ss$effort_index)

      if(n_eff < 5 || n_int < params$bss_min_interviews) {
        cat(sprintf("  Insufficient data (%d effort, %d interviews), PE fallback.\n", n_eff, n_int))
        bss_all[[label]] <- list(C_sum=NA, E_sum=NA, pe_fallback=TRUE,
                                 population=pop, subseason=ss$name, catch_group=cg)
        next
      }

      bss_data <- prep_bss_crab(days_ss, summ_ss, cg, params, pop, ie_data = ie_data)
      ar_resolutions[[label]] <- attr(bss_data, "ar_resolution")

      is_shore   <- (pop == "shore")
      is_boat    <- (pop == "private_boat")
      is_allgear <- (ss$name == "all_gear")
      is_ringnet <- (ss$name == "ring_net_only")

      # v6.1/v6.2: per-fit sampler tuning. Each branch sets iter, warmup,
      # max_treedepth, and adapt_delta; any fit without a specific override
      # uses the *_default values. Ported from the gear-resolved track (v6.1)
      # and extended with a boat all-gear branch (v6.2). The boat all-gear fit
      # produced 5998 divergences with treedepth_pct = 0 in the 2026-04-08 run,
      # so step size (adapt_delta), not trajectory length, was the binding
      # constraint: adapt_delta is raised to 0.99 and max_treedepth to 13 (the
      # smaller steps from a higher adapt_delta lengthen trajectories, so the
      # deeper tree is a buffer against new treedepth saturation).
      if(is_shore && is_allgear) {
        fit_iter    <- params$bss_iter_shore_allgear
        fit_warmup  <- params$bss_warmup_shore_allgear
        fit_treedep <- params$bss_treedepth_shore_allgear %||% params$bss_max_treedepth_default
        fit_delta   <- params$bss_delta_shore_allgear     %||% params$bss_adapt_delta
      } else if(is_boat && is_allgear) {
        fit_iter    <- params$bss_iter_boat_allgear      %||% params$bss_iter_default
        fit_warmup  <- params$bss_warmup_boat_allgear    %||% params$bss_warmup_default
        fit_treedep <- params$bss_treedepth_boat_allgear %||% params$bss_max_treedepth_default
        fit_delta   <- params$bss_delta_boat_allgear     %||% params$bss_adapt_delta
      } else if(is_ringnet) {
        fit_iter    <- params$bss_iter_default
        fit_warmup  <- params$bss_warmup_default
        fit_treedep <- params$bss_treedepth_ringnet %||% params$bss_max_treedepth_default
        fit_delta   <- params$bss_delta_ringnet     %||% params$bss_adapt_delta
      } else {
        fit_iter    <- params$bss_iter_default
        fit_warmup  <- params$bss_warmup_default
        fit_treedep <- params$bss_max_treedepth_default
        fit_delta   <- params$bss_adapt_delta
      }

      cat(sprintf("  Stan: iter=%d, warmup=%d, max_treedepth=%d, adapt_delta=%.2f, D=%d days, P_n=%d (%s), %d interviews\n",
                  fit_iter, fit_warmup, fit_treedep, fit_delta, bss_data$D, bss_data$P_n,
                  attr(bss_data, "ar_resolution"), bss_data$IntC))

      timer_start(paste0("BSS_", label))
      fit <- rstan::stan(
        file = here("stan_models", params$bss_model_file),
        data = bss_data,
        chains = params$bss_chains, iter = fit_iter, warmup = fit_warmup,
        control = list(adapt_delta=fit_delta, max_treedepth=fit_treedep),
        cores = params$bss_cores
      )
      timer_stop(paste0("BSS_", label))

      # --- Extract BOTH expected and predictive catch ---
      bss_pars <- c("C_sum","C_expected_sum","E_sum","B1","B2","B1_C_out")
      if(bss_data$IE_n > 0) bss_pars <- c(bss_pars, "sigma_IE_out")
      bss_summ <- summary(fit, pars=bss_pars)$summary
      cat("  BSS Summary:\n"); print(bss_summ)
      write.csv(as.data.frame(bss_summ), file.path(output_dir, paste0("bss_summary_",label,".csv")))

      C_draws <- rstan::extract(fit, "C_sum")$C_sum           # predictive (with Poisson noise)
      C_exp_draws <- rstan::extract(fit, "C_expected_sum")$C_expected_sum  # expected (no noise)
      E_draws <- rstan::extract(fit, "E_sum")$E_sum

      bss_all[[label]] <- list(
        C_sum = quantile(C_draws, c(0.025,0.5,0.975)),
        C_expected_sum = quantile(C_exp_draws, c(0.025,0.5,0.975)),
        E_sum = quantile(E_draws, c(0.025,0.5,0.975)),
        C_draws = C_draws, C_exp_draws = C_exp_draws, E_draws = E_draws,
        fit = fit, pe_fallback = FALSE,
        population = pop, subseason = ss$name, catch_group = cg
      )

      # --- Use C_expected (no Poisson noise) for primary estimates ---
      E_bss <- rstan::extract(fit, "E")$E
      C_exp_bss <- rstan::extract(fit, "C_expected")$C_expected

      E_daily <- tibble(
        event_date = days_ss$event_date,
        median = apply(E_bss[,1,,1], 2, median),
        lo95 = apply(E_bss[,1,,1], 2, quantile, 0.025),
        hi95 = apply(E_bss[,1,,1], 2, quantile, 0.975)
      )

      C_daily <- tibble(
        event_date = days_ss$event_date,
        median = apply(C_exp_bss[,1,,1], 2, median),
        lo95 = apply(C_exp_bss[,1,,1], 2, quantile, 0.025),
        hi95 = apply(C_exp_bss[,1,,1], 2, quantile, 0.975)
      )

      # BSS effort plot
      p_bss_eff <- E_daily |>
        ggplot(aes(x = event_date)) +
        geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo95, ymax = hi95), alpha = 0.2, fill = "steelblue") +
        geom_line(aes(y = median), color = "steelblue") +
        labs(title = sprintf("BSS Daily Effort: %s", label),
             subtitle = "Median with 95% credible interval (daily AR(1))",
             x = "Date", y = "Crabber-hours") +
        theme_bw()
      ggsave(file.path(output_dir, paste0("plot_bss_effort_", label, ".png")),
             p_bss_eff, width = 10, height = 6)

      # BSS catch plot (using expected catch)
      p_bss_catch <- C_daily |>
        ggplot(aes(x = event_date)) +
        geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lo95, ymax = hi95), alpha = 0.2, fill = "darkgreen") +
        geom_line(aes(y = median), color = "darkgreen") +
        labs(title = sprintf("BSS Daily Expected Catch: %s", label),
             subtitle = "E[C|data] with 95% CI (no Poisson sampling noise)",
             x = "Date", y = "Expected Dungeness caught") +
        theme_bw()
      ggsave(file.path(output_dir, paste0("plot_bss_catch_", label, ".png")),
             p_bss_catch, width = 10, height = 6)

      # Posterior densities
      p_bss_post <- tibble(
        `Expected Catch` = C_exp_draws,
        `Predictive Catch` = C_draws,
        `Effort` = E_draws
      ) |>
        pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "param", values_to = "value") |>
        ggplot(aes(x = value, fill = param)) +
        geom_density(alpha = 0.4) +
        facet_wrap(~param, scales = "free") +
        labs(title = sprintf("BSS Posteriors: %s", label), x = "Value", y = "Density") +
        theme_bw() + theme(legend.position = "none")
      ggsave(file.path(output_dir, paste0("plot_bss_posteriors_", label, ".png")),
             p_bss_post, width = 14, height = 5)

      write.csv(E_daily, file.path(output_dir, paste0("bss_daily_effort_", label, ".csv")), row.names=FALSE)
      write.csv(C_daily, file.path(output_dir, paste0("bss_daily_catch_", label, ".csv")), row.names=FALSE)

      # Save L posterior if estimated
      if(bss_data$estimate_L == 1) {
        L_post <- rstan::extract(fit, "L_out")$L_out  # [draws, D]
        L_daily <- tibble(
          event_date = days_ss$event_date,
          L_prior_mu = days_ss$L_mu,
          L_posterior_median = apply(L_post, 2, median),
          L_posterior_lo95 = apply(L_post, 2, quantile, 0.025),
          L_posterior_hi95 = apply(L_post, 2, quantile, 0.975)
        )
        write.csv(L_daily, file.path(output_dir, paste0("bss_L_effective_", label, ".csv")), row.names=FALSE)
      }
    }
  }
}
timer_stop("5_BSS_model_runs")


# ---- 7.7 COMBINED BSS PORT TOTAL ----
timer_start("6_outputs")
cat("\n", strrep("=",60), "\n COMBINED RESULTS\n", strrep("=",60), "\n")

n_draws_max <- max(sapply(bss_all, function(b) {
  if(!is.null(b$pe_fallback) && b$pe_fallback) return(0)
  length(b$C_exp_draws)
}))
if(n_draws_max == 0) n_draws_max <- params$bss_chains * (params$bss_iter_default - params$bss_warmup_default)

for(cg in bss_catch_groups) {
  bss_C_total <- rep(0, n_draws_max)    # expected catch
  bss_C_pred_total <- rep(0, n_draws_max) # predictive catch
  bss_E_total <- rep(0, n_draws_max)

  for(pop in c("shore","private_boat")) {
    for(ss in list(subseason_1, subseason_2)) {
      label <- paste0(pop, "_", ss$name, "_", cg)
      pe_label <- paste0(pop, "_", ss$name)
      b <- bss_all[[label]]

      if(!is.null(b$pe_fallback) && b$pe_fallback) {
        bss_C_total <- bss_C_total + (pe_all[[pe_label]][[cg]] %||% 0)
        bss_C_pred_total <- bss_C_pred_total + (pe_all[[pe_label]][[cg]] %||% 0)
        bss_E_total <- bss_E_total + pe_all[[pe_label]]$effort_total
      } else {
        n <- length(b$C_exp_draws)
        idx <- rep_len(1:n, n_draws_max)
        bss_C_total <- bss_C_total + b$C_exp_draws[idx]
        bss_C_pred_total <- bss_C_pred_total + b$C_draws[idx]
        bss_E_total <- bss_E_total + b$E_draws[idx]
      }
    }
  }
  bss_C_total <- bss_C_total + (pe_all$comm_charter[[cg]] %||% 0)
  bss_C_pred_total <- bss_C_pred_total + (pe_all$comm_charter[[cg]] %||% 0)
  bss_E_total <- bss_E_total + pe_all$comm_charter$effort_total

  final_table <- tibble(
    Catch_Group = cg,
    Estimate = c("Effort", "Expected_Catch", "Predictive_Catch"),
    PE = c(round(pe_summary$Effort_hrs[6]),
           round(if(cg=="Dungeness_Kept") pe_summary$Dungeness[6] else pe_summary$Red_Rock[6]),
           NA),
    BSS_median = c(round(median(bss_E_total)), round(median(bss_C_total)), round(median(bss_C_pred_total))),
    BSS_lo95 = c(round(quantile(bss_E_total,0.025)), round(quantile(bss_C_total,0.025)), round(quantile(bss_C_pred_total,0.025))),
    BSS_hi95 = c(round(quantile(bss_E_total,0.975)), round(quantile(bss_C_total,0.975)), round(quantile(bss_C_pred_total,0.975)))
  )

  cat(sprintf("\n--- Port Total: %s ---\n", cg))
  print(final_table)
  write.csv(final_table, file.path(output_dir, paste0("port_total_",cg,".csv")), row.names=FALSE)
}


# ---- 7.8 MONTHLY ESTIMATES ----
cat("\n", strrep("=",60), "\n MONTHLY ESTIMATES\n", strrep("=",60), "\n")

days_full <- prep_days_crab(params$est_date_start, params$est_date_end,
                            params$days_wkend, crabbing_holiday_dates,
                            params$period_pe, params$sections, L_eff_model = L_eff_model)

month_lookup <- days_full |>
  mutate(month_label = format(event_date, "%Y-%m")) |>
  select(event_date, month_label)

all_months <- sort(unique(month_lookup$month_label))
monthly_C_draws <- matrix(0, nrow = n_draws_max, ncol = length(all_months),
                          dimnames = list(NULL, all_months))
monthly_E_draws <- matrix(0, nrow = n_draws_max, ncol = length(all_months),
                          dimnames = list(NULL, all_months))

for(cg in bss_catch_groups) {
  for(pop in c("shore","private_boat")) {
    for(ss in list(subseason_1, subseason_2)) {
      label <- paste0(pop, "_", ss$name, "_", cg)
      pe_label <- paste0(pop, "_", ss$name)
      b <- bss_all[[label]]

      days_ss <- prep_days_crab(ss$start, ss$end, params$days_wkend, crabbing_holiday_dates,
                                params$period_pe, params$sections, L_eff_model = L_eff_model)
      days_ss$month_label <- format(days_ss$event_date, "%Y-%m")

      if(!is.null(b$pe_fallback) && b$pe_fallback) {
        summ_ss <- prep_population_summary(dwg, pop, ss$start, ss$end, params)
        pe_daily <- summ_ss$effort_index |>
          filter(count_sequence <= params$bss_max_count_seq) |>
          group_by(event_date) |>
          summarise(mean_count = mean(count_quantity), .groups = "drop") |>
          left_join(days_ss |> select(event_date, day_length, month_label), by = "event_date") |>
          mutate(daily_effort = mean_count * summ_ss$crabbers_per_gear * day_length)

        monthly_pe <- pe_daily |>
          group_by(month_label) |>
          summarise(month_effort = sum(daily_effort), .groups = "drop") |>
          mutate(share = month_effort / sum(month_effort))

        pe_catch_total <- pe_all[[pe_label]][[cg]] %||% 0
        pe_effort_total <- pe_all[[pe_label]]$effort_total

        for(m in monthly_pe$month_label) {
          if(m %in% all_months) {
            sh <- monthly_pe$share[monthly_pe$month_label == m]
            monthly_C_draws[, m] <- monthly_C_draws[, m] + pe_catch_total * sh
            monthly_E_draws[, m] <- monthly_E_draws[, m] + pe_effort_total * sh
          }
        }
      } else {
        # Use C_expected (no Poisson noise) for monthly totals
        C_exp_bss <- rstan::extract(b$fit, "C_expected")$C_expected
        E_bss <- rstan::extract(b$fit, "E")$E
        n_fit_draws <- dim(C_exp_bss)[1]

        C_daily_mat <- C_exp_bss[,1,,1]
        E_daily_mat <- E_bss[,1,,1]

        for(m in unique(days_ss$month_label)) {
          day_idx <- which(days_ss$month_label == m)
          if(length(day_idx) == 0) next
          month_C <- if(length(day_idx)==1) C_daily_mat[, day_idx] else rowSums(C_daily_mat[, day_idx])
          month_E <- if(length(day_idx)==1) E_daily_mat[, day_idx] else rowSums(E_daily_mat[, day_idx])
          idx <- rep_len(1:n_fit_draws, n_draws_max)
          if(m %in% all_months) {
            monthly_C_draws[, m] <- monthly_C_draws[, m] + month_C[idx]
            monthly_E_draws[, m] <- monthly_E_draws[, m] + month_E[idx]
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

# Add commercial/charter
if(!is.null(pe_all$comm_charter$daily_est)) {
  comm_daily <- pe_all$comm_charter$daily_est |>
    mutate(month_label = format(date, "%Y-%m"))
  comm_total <- pe_all$comm_charter$Dungeness_Kept
  total_sampled_dung <- sum(comm_daily$est_dung)
  if(total_sampled_dung > 0) {
    for(m in unique(comm_daily$month_label)) {
      if(m %in% all_months) {
        share <- sum(comm_daily$est_dung[comm_daily$month_label == m]) / total_sampled_dung
        monthly_C_draws[, m] <- monthly_C_draws[, m] + comm_total * share
      }
    }
  }
}

monthly_summary <- tibble(
  Month = all_months,
  BSS_Catch_median = apply(monthly_C_draws, 2, median),
  BSS_Catch_lo95   = apply(monthly_C_draws, 2, quantile, 0.025),
  BSS_Catch_hi95   = apply(monthly_C_draws, 2, quantile, 0.975),
  BSS_Effort_median = apply(monthly_E_draws, 2, median),
  BSS_Effort_lo95   = apply(monthly_E_draws, 2, quantile, 0.025),
  BSS_Effort_hi95   = apply(monthly_E_draws, 2, quantile, 0.975)
) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round))

print(monthly_summary |> select(Month, BSS_Catch_median, BSS_Catch_lo95, BSS_Catch_hi95))
write.csv(monthly_summary, file.path(output_dir, "monthly_estimates.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

p_monthly <- monthly_summary |>
  mutate(Month = factor(Month, levels = all_months)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Month)) +
  geom_col(aes(y = BSS_Catch_median), fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = BSS_Catch_lo95, ymax = BSS_Catch_hi95), width = 0.3) +
  labs(title = "Monthly Dungeness Catch (Expected, no Poisson noise)",
       x = "Month", y = "Dungeness crab caught") +
  theme_bw() + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "plot_monthly_catch.png"), p_monthly, width = 12, height = 6)


# ===========================================================================
# 7.9 CATCH BY CRABBING MODE
# ===========================================================================

cat("\n", strrep("=",60), "\n CATCH BY CRABBING MODE\n", strrep("=",60), "\n")

mode_table <- tibble(
  Mode = c("Shore (Dock/Jetty/Beach)", "Private Boat", "Commercial/Charter", "PORT TOTAL"),
  PE_Catch = c(
    (pe_all$shore_ring_net_only$Dungeness_Kept %||% 0) + (pe_all$shore_all_gear$Dungeness_Kept %||% 0),
    (pe_all$private_boat_ring_net_only$Dungeness_Kept %||% 0) + (pe_all$private_boat_all_gear$Dungeness_Kept %||% 0),
    pe_all$comm_charter$Dungeness_Kept %||% 0, NA
  ),
  PE_Effort = c(
    (pe_all$shore_ring_net_only$effort_total %||% 0) + (pe_all$shore_all_gear$effort_total %||% 0),
    (pe_all$private_boat_ring_net_only$effort_total %||% 0) + (pe_all$private_boat_all_gear$effort_total %||% 0),
    pe_all$comm_charter$effort_total %||% 0, NA
  )
)
mode_table$PE_Catch[4] <- sum(mode_table$PE_Catch[1:3], na.rm = TRUE)
mode_table$PE_Effort[4] <- sum(mode_table$PE_Effort[1:3], na.rm = TRUE)
print(mode_table |> mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round)))
write.csv(mode_table, file.path(output_dir, "catch_by_mode.csv"), row.names = FALSE)


# ===========================================================================
# 7.10 CATCH BY GEAR TYPE (proportional allocation from interviews)
#
# Pooled model: uses interview data to estimate the proportion of catch
# by primary gear type, then applies to combined catch estimates.
# ===========================================================================

cat("\n", strrep("=",60), "\n CATCH BY GEAR TYPE (proportional)\n", strrep("=",60), "\n")

gear_catch <- dwg$interview |>
  filter(population %in% c("shore","private_boat"), dungeness_kept > 0) |>
  mutate(
    gear_primary = case_when(
      str_detect(gear_type, "(?i)^pot|, pot|pot,") & !str_detect(gear_type, "(?i)slip ring") ~ "Pot",
      str_detect(gear_type, "(?i)ring net")     ~ "Ring Net",
      str_detect(gear_type, "(?i)trap|star")    ~ "Trap",
      str_detect(gear_type, "(?i)snare")        ~ "Snare",
      TRUE                                      ~ "Other"
    )
  )

gear_props <- gear_catch |>
  group_by(population, gear_primary) |>
  summarise(total_catch = sum(dungeness_kept), n_int = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  group_by(population) |>
  mutate(prop_catch = total_catch / sum(total_catch)) |>
  ungroup()

cat("\n  Observed catch proportions by gear type:\n")
print(gear_props |> select(population, gear_primary, n_int, total_catch, prop_catch) |>
        mutate(prop_catch = round(prop_catch, 3)))

total_shore_catch <- pe_summary$Dungeness[1] + pe_summary$Dungeness[2]
total_boat_catch <- pe_summary$Dungeness[3] + pe_summary$Dungeness[4]

gear_estimates <- gear_props |>
  mutate(
    pop_total_PE = case_when(
      population == "shore" ~ total_shore_catch,
      population == "private_boat" ~ total_boat_catch),
    est_catch_PE = round(pop_total_PE * prop_catch)
  ) |>
  select(population, gear_primary, prop_catch, est_catch_PE) |>
  arrange(population, desc(prop_catch))

gear_estimates <- bind_rows(
  gear_estimates,
  tibble(population = "comm_charter", gear_primary = "Pot",
         prop_catch = 1.0, est_catch_PE = round(pe_all$comm_charter$Dungeness_Kept %||% 0))
)

gear_summary <- gear_estimates |>
  group_by(gear_primary) |>
  summarise(PE_Catch = sum(est_catch_PE), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(desc(PE_Catch)) |>
  mutate(Proportion = round(PE_Catch / sum(PE_Catch), 3))

cat("\n--- Catch by Gear Type (proportional allocation) ---\n")
print(gear_summary)
write.csv(gear_summary, file.path(output_dir, "catch_by_gear_type.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

p_gear <- gear_summary |>
  mutate(gear_primary = fct_reorder(gear_primary, PE_Catch)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = gear_primary, y = PE_Catch, fill = gear_primary)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%s (%.0f%%)", format(PE_Catch, big.mark=","), Proportion*100)),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Estimated Dungeness Catch by Gear Type (Proportional Allocation)",
       x = "Gear Type", y = "Estimated Catch") +
  theme_bw() + theme(legend.position = "none") + coord_flip()
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "plot_catch_by_gear_type.png"), p_gear, width = 10, height = 6)


# ---- 7.11 CONVERGENCE REPORT ----
cat("\n", strrep("=",60), "\n CONVERGENCE REPORT\n", strrep("=",60), "\n")

convergence_report <- list()
for(label in names(bss_all)) {
  b <- bss_all[[label]]
  if(!is.null(b$pe_fallback) && b$pe_fallback) {
    convergence_report[[label]] <- tibble(
      fit = label, ar_resolution = NA_character_, divergences = NA, treedepth_pct = NA,
      C_sum_rhat = NA, E_sum_rhat = NA, C_sum_neff = NA, E_sum_neff = NA,
      B1_C_rhat = NA,
      pass_convergence = FALSE, method_selected = "PE (insufficient data)"
    )
  } else {
    sp <- rstan::get_sampler_params(b$fit, inc_warmup = FALSE)
    n_divergent <- sum(sapply(sp, function(x) sum(x[,"divergent__"])))
    n_treedepth <- sum(sapply(sp, function(x) sum(x[,"treedepth__"] >=
      b$fit@stan_args[[1]]$control$max_treedepth)))
    n_total <- sum(sapply(sp, nrow))

    summ <- summary(b$fit, pars = c("C_sum","C_expected_sum","E_sum","B1_C_out"))$summary
    rhat_C <- summ["C_expected_sum","Rhat"]; rhat_E <- summ["E_sum","Rhat"]
    neff_C <- summ["C_expected_sum","n_eff"]; neff_E <- summ["E_sum","n_eff"]
    rhat_B1C <- summ["B1_C_out","Rhat"]

    pass_rhat <- max(rhat_C, rhat_E, na.rm=TRUE) < 1.01  # v6.4: tightened from 1.05 (Vehtari et al. 2021)
    pass_neff <- min(neff_C, neff_E, na.rm=TRUE) > 400
    # v6.1: divergent transitions are now part of the gate (ported from
    # gear-resolved v5.2). Divergences bias the posterior even when R-hat and
    # ESS are clean (Betancourt 2017), so a fit with > max_divergences fails
    # to the PE fallback rather than being reported as a clean BSS pass.
    pass_divergence <- (n_divergent <= params$max_divergences)
    pass <- pass_rhat & pass_neff & pass_divergence

    # v6.1: warn on treedepth saturation (soft signal, not a hard fail) and on
    # any divergences, mirroring the gear-resolved diagnostics output.
    if(n_total > 0 && n_treedepth / n_total > 0.05) {
      cat(sprintf("  WARNING: %s - %.1f%% treedepth exceedances (consider increasing max_treedepth)\n",
                  label, n_treedepth / n_total * 100))
    }
    if(n_divergent > 0) {
      cat(sprintf("  WARNING: %s - %d divergent transitions detected\n", label, n_divergent))
    }

    convergence_report[[label]] <- tibble(
      fit = label,
      ar_resolution = ar_resolutions[[label]] %||% NA_character_,
      divergences = n_divergent,
      treedepth_pct = round(n_treedepth / n_total * 100, 1),
      C_sum_rhat = round(rhat_C, 4),
      E_sum_rhat = round(rhat_E, 4),
      C_sum_neff = round(neff_C),
      E_sum_neff = round(neff_E),
      B1_C_rhat = round(rhat_B1C, 4),
      pass_convergence = pass,
      method_selected = if(pass) "BSS" else "PE (convergence fail)"
    )
  }
}
convergence_df <- bind_rows(convergence_report)
print(convergence_df)
write.csv(convergence_df, file.path(output_dir, "convergence_report.csv"), row.names = FALSE)


# ---- 7.14 EFFORT & CPUE MULTIPLIERS ----
cat("\n", strrep("=",60), "\n EFFORT & CPUE MULTIPLIERS\n", strrep("=",60), "\n")

multiplier_results <- list()
for(label in names(bss_all)) {
  b <- bss_all[[label]]
  if(is.null(b$pe_fallback) || !b$pe_fallback) {
    B1_draws <- rstan::extract(b$fit, "B1")$B1
    B2_draws <- rstan::extract(b$fit, "B2")$B2
    B1C_draws <- rstan::extract(b$fit, "B1_C_out")$B1_C_out

    weekend_eff_mult <- exp(B1_draws)
    holiday_eff_mult <- exp(B1_draws + B2_draws)
    weekend_cpue_mult <- exp(B1C_draws)

    multiplier_results[[label]] <- tibble(
      fit = label,
      weekend_effort_mult = sprintf("%.2fx (%.2f-%.2f)",
        median(weekend_eff_mult), quantile(weekend_eff_mult, 0.025), quantile(weekend_eff_mult, 0.975)),
      holiday_effort_mult = sprintf("%.2fx (%.2f-%.2f)",
        median(holiday_eff_mult), quantile(holiday_eff_mult, 0.025), quantile(holiday_eff_mult, 0.975)),
      weekend_cpue_mult = sprintf("%.2fx (%.2f-%.2f)",
        median(weekend_cpue_mult), quantile(weekend_cpue_mult, 0.025), quantile(weekend_cpue_mult, 0.975)),
      B1_C_median = round(median(B1C_draws), 3),
      B1_C_lo95 = round(quantile(B1C_draws, 0.025), 3),
      B1_C_hi95 = round(quantile(B1C_draws, 0.975), 3)
    )
  }
}
if(length(multiplier_results) > 0) {
  multiplier_df <- bind_rows(multiplier_results)
  cat("\n  Multipliers relative to weekdays:\n")
  for(i in 1:nrow(multiplier_df)) {
    cat(sprintf("    %s:\n      Weekend effort: %s\n      Holiday effort: %s\n      Weekend CPUE: %s\n",
                multiplier_df$fit[i],
                multiplier_df$weekend_effort_mult[i],
                multiplier_df$holiday_effort_mult[i],
                multiplier_df$weekend_cpue_mult[i]))
  }
  write.csv(multiplier_df, file.path(output_dir, "effort_cpue_multipliers.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
}


# ---- 7.16 R_G AND R_T POSTERIORS ----
cat("\n", strrep("=",60), "\n EXPANSION RATIOS (R_G, R_T)\n", strrep("=",60), "\n")

expansion_results <- list()
for(label in names(bss_all)) {
  b <- bss_all[[label]]
  if(is.null(b$pe_fallback) || !b$pe_fallback) {
    R_G_draws <- rstan::extract(b$fit, "R_G")$R_G
    R_T_draws <- rstan::extract(b$fit, "R_T")$R_T

    expansion_results[[label]] <- tibble(
      fit = label,
      R_G_interpretation = sprintf("%.2f gear/crabber (%.2f-%.2f)",
        median(R_G_draws), quantile(R_G_draws, 0.025), quantile(R_G_draws, 0.975)),
      R_T_interpretation = sprintf("%.2f trailers/group (%.2f-%.2f)",
        median(R_T_draws), quantile(R_T_draws, 0.025), quantile(R_T_draws, 0.975))
    )
  }
}
if(length(expansion_results) > 0) {
  expansion_df <- bind_rows(expansion_results)
  for(i in 1:nrow(expansion_df)) {
    cat(sprintf("  %s: R_G=%s, R_T=%s\n",
                expansion_df$fit[i], expansion_df$R_G_interpretation[i],
                expansion_df$R_T_interpretation[i]))
  }
  write.csv(expansion_df, file.path(output_dir, "expansion_ratios.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
}


# ---- 7.17 PE VS BSS COMPARISON ----
cat("\n", strrep("=",60), "\n PE VS BSS COMPARISON\n", strrep("=",60), "\n")

comparison <- list()
for(pop in c("shore","private_boat")) {
  for(ss in list(subseason_1, subseason_2)) {
    label_cg <- paste0(pop, "_", ss$name, "_Dungeness_Kept")
    pe_label <- paste0(pop, "_", ss$name)
    b <- bss_all[[label_cg]]

    pe_catch <- pe_all[[pe_label]]$Dungeness_Kept %||% 0
    pe_effort <- pe_all[[pe_label]]$effort_total %||% 0

    if(!is.null(b) && (is.null(b$pe_fallback) || !b$pe_fallback)) {
      bss_catch <- b$C_expected_sum["50%"]
      bss_effort <- b$E_sum["50%"]
      catch_diff_pct <- round((bss_catch - pe_catch) / pe_catch * 100, 1)
      effort_diff_pct <- round((bss_effort - pe_effort) / pe_effort * 100, 1)
      conv <- convergence_df |> filter(fit == label_cg)
      method <- if(nrow(conv) > 0 && conv$pass_convergence[1]) "BSS" else "PE"
    } else {
      bss_catch <- NA; bss_effort <- NA
      catch_diff_pct <- NA; effort_diff_pct <- NA
      method <- "PE"
    }

    comparison[[length(comparison)+1]] <- tibble(
      component = paste0(pop, " (", ss$name, ")"),
      PE_effort = round(pe_effort), BSS_effort = round(bss_effort),
      effort_diff_pct = effort_diff_pct,
      PE_catch = round(pe_catch), BSS_catch = round(bss_catch),
      catch_diff_pct = catch_diff_pct,
      method_selected = method
    )
  }
}
comparison[[length(comparison)+1]] <- tibble(
  component = "comm_charter (census)",
  PE_effort = round(pe_all$comm_charter$effort_total), BSS_effort = NA, effort_diff_pct = NA,
  PE_catch = round(pe_all$comm_charter$Dungeness_Kept), BSS_catch = NA, catch_diff_pct = NA,
  method_selected = "Census"
)
comparison_df <- bind_rows(comparison)
print(comparison_df)
write.csv(comparison_df, file.path(output_dir, "pe_vs_bss_comparison.csv"), row.names = FALSE)


# ---- 7.18 SEASON SUMMARY ----
cat("\n", strrep("=",60), "\n SEASON SUMMARY\n", strrep("=",60), "\n")

season_days <- as.integer(as.Date(params$est_date_end) - as.Date(params$est_date_start) + 1)
total_effort_days <- n_distinct(c(dwg$shore_effort$event_date, dwg$boat_effort$event_date))
total_interview_n <- nrow(dwg$interview)
n_bss_fits <- sum(!sapply(bss_all, function(b) !is.null(b$pe_fallback) && b$pe_fallback))
n_pass <- sum(convergence_df$pass_convergence, na.rm=TRUE)

cat(sprintf("\n  Season: %s to %s (%d days)\n", params$est_date_start, params$est_date_end, season_days))
cat(sprintf("  Effort days sampled: %d (%d%%)\n", total_effort_days, round(total_effort_days/season_days*100)))
cat(sprintf("  Total interviews: %d\n", total_interview_n))
cat(sprintf("  BSS convergence: %d of %d fits passed\n", n_pass, n_bss_fits))

season_summary <- tibble(
  metric = c("Model configuration", "Season start", "Season end", "Season days",
             "Effort days sampled", "Total interviews", "BSS fits attempted", "BSS fits passed",
             "L_effective method", "AR temporal resolution"),
  value = c("Adaptive AR + L uncertainty", params$est_date_start, params$est_date_end,
            as.character(season_days), as.character(total_effort_days),
            as.character(total_interview_n), as.character(n_bss_fits), as.character(n_pass),
            if(!is.null(L_eff_model)) L_eff_model$method else "civil_twilight",
            paste(unique(na.omit(unlist(ar_resolutions))), collapse = ", "))
)
write.csv(season_summary, file.path(output_dir, "season_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)


# ---- 7.19 SAVE PARAMETERS ----
timer_stop("6_outputs")
writeLines(capture.output(str(params)), file.path(output_dir, "run_parameters.txt"))

cat(sprintf("\nAll outputs saved to: %s\n", output_dir))
cat(paste(" ", list.files(output_dir), collapse="\n"), "\n")

# ---- TIMING SUMMARY ----
run_total <- difftime(Sys.time(), run_start_time, units = "mins")
cat("\n", strrep("=",60), "\n TIMING SUMMARY\n", strrep("=",60), "\n")
timing_df <- tibble(
  Section = names(timer_log),
  Minutes = sapply(timer_log, function(x) round(as.numeric(x$elapsed), 1))
)
print(timing_df, n = 20)
cat(sprintf("\n  TOTAL RUNTIME: %.1f minutes (%.1f hours)\n",
            as.numeric(run_total), as.numeric(run_total)/60))

```
